name: SakuttoWorks-Agent-Commerce-OS-Catalog
description: The official MCP catalog for Sakutto Works Agent-Commerce-OS. Provides autonomous tools for deep research, status monitoring, and structured data ETL.

tools.name: search_data
tools.description: High-fidelity autonomous research tool. Performs deep web scraping and returns structured Markdown/JSON optimized for RAG pipelines.

query.description: The specific research topic or complex query to investigate.

depth.description: Research depth level. 'deep' includes extensive technical documentation analysis.

tools.name: get_status
tools.description: Retrieves real-time operational status and latency metrics of the Agent-Commerce-OS infrastructure (Gateway and Core layers).

tools.name: structured_data_etl
tools.description: Extracts and normalizes numerical data tables via Agent-Commerce-Core. Provides structured outputs for business intelligence or data science tasks.

dataset_identifier.description: The target identifier (e.g., ticker, code, or ID) for the data set to process.
